    Unterklassen von Item in model.items
    Modifizierer und Typ
    Klasse
    Beschreibung
    class 
    Consumable
    Represents a consumable item that can be used to apply an effect to an entity.
    Methoden in model.items, die Typen mit Argumenten vom Typ Item zurückgeben
    Modifizierer und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    List<Item>
    Inventory.getEquipments(Itemtype type)
    Returns all items of a specific type.
    Map.Entry<Item,Integer>
    Inventory.getItem(String name)
    Finds an item entry by its name (case-insensitive).
    Map<Item,Integer>
    Inventory.getItems()
    Returns the internal map of items and their quantities.
    Methoden in model.items mit Parametern vom Typ Item
    Modifizierer und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    void
    Inventory.addItem(Item item, int amount)
    Adds a specified amount of an item to the inventory.
    boolean
    Inventory.contains(Item item)
    Checks whether the inventory contains a specific item.
    int
    Inventory.getAmount(Item item)
    Returns the quantity of a specific item in the inventory.
    boolean
    Inventory.removeItem(Item item, int amount)
    Removes a specified amount of an item from the inventory.

    Modifizierer und Typ
    Klasse
    Beschreibung
    class 
    Accessory
    Represents an accessory item that can be equipped by the player.
    class 
    Armor
    Represents an armor item that can be equipped by the player.
    class 
    Headwear
    Represents a headwear item that can be equipped by the player.
    class 
    Weapon
    Represents a weapon item that can be equipped by the player.

    Beschreibung
